title: Kargul
content:

The '''kargul''' was a type of [[Worm/Legends|worm]] that lived on [[Trindello/Legends|Trindello]], a [[Temperature/Legends|cool]], [[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="Endor" /> located in the [[Trindello system/Legends|Trindello system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Reaching eighty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, kargul could burrow underground and did not rely on sight. The worms were [[Local day/Legends|nocturnal]] and lived in packs. They were generally shy but could become fierce opponents when agitated.<ref name="Endor" />

Kargul laired at the center of the clusters of gigantic [[Tree/Legends|trees]] known as [[Trindellan oak]]s, which covered the moon's surface. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]<ref name="Endor" /> that lasted from [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> several parties of loggers who were harvesting the valuable Trindellan oak [[Wood/Legends|wood]] had come into conflict with kargul.<ref name="Endor" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kargul.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Chris Trevas's kargul illustration]]
The kargul was introduced in the article "[[Endor and the Moddell Sector]]," which was published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 9|ninth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine<ref name="Endor" /> on [[February 22]], [[2002]].<ref name="GamerDate">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020222.html|text=Starfighters Soar in Gamer #9}}</ref> [[Chris Trevas]] also depicted a kargul for inclusion in<ref name="Trevas">{{WebCite|url=http://www.christrevas.com/starwars/rpg_ua4.html|text=Portfolio - Star Wars: Ultimate Adversaries|author=[[Chris Trevas]]|archivedate=20080915191135|nolive=1}}</ref> the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'', but the creature was ultimately not featured in the book.<ref name="UA">''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]''</ref>

The illustration depicted an agitated kargul emerging from underground at a Trindellan oak logging site, with the worm being portrayed with a smooth [[Color/Legends|black]] skin and a large [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] that had two [[Tooth/Legends|toothed]] jaws and a red [[Tongue/Legends|tongue]].<ref name="Trevas" />
